LSE-HS10-L4-10001300-HSGEO-STP-MNA-02 • HS Math: Geometry • Laws of Sines and Cosines

The Loom Measure

Click   🎧   to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION:
What is the girl trying to decide?
Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Construct a complete explanation: state what the girl is deliberating between, explain why her two options put her at a crossroads, and describe the decision she is trying to resolve.
